reason: All major claims are well-supported. The Marietta-to-Cho betrayal transfer is widely documented and considered one of the most significant character changes in the series. The DH Part 2 statue scene swap (Cho offers in the book, Ginny redirects to Luna) is confirmed. The characterization gap - book Cho being assertive, jealous, and emotionally volatile vs film Cho being passive and sad - matches fan and critic consensus. The 61/100 score is plausible given that the films retain her grief, her relationship with Harry, and her DA membership, but gut the Marietta arc, her agency, and her emotional complexity. Minor uncertainty on the Owlery/Filch scene claim (not independently verified in this search), hence not a 10.
